calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Respondent/Plaintiff Nicholas Henry Olsen appeared on his own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant Matthew Adams appeared on his own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff Nicholas Henry Olsen testifies on his own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant Matthew Adams testifies on his own behalf.

Respondent/Plaintiff introduces the following evidence:
Exhibit 1 - Lease addendum
Exhibit 2 - copy of six checks
Exhibit 3 - texts between Frank Wong and Brendan O'Connor
Exhibit 4 - copy of text messages regarding deposit
Exhibit 5 - photograph of bedroom
Exhibit 6 - Direct Credit Control Collection Agreement
Exhibit 7 - Photocopy of three photos: two of men on public transit, 1 baseball field
Exhibit 8 - Venmo records
Exhibit 9 - Document regarding return of security deposit
Exhibit 10 - Document regarding moving in and out

Appellant/Defendant introduces the following evidence:
Defense A - Notarized statement from Brendan O'Connor - 2 pages
Defense B - Group of photographs of door and interior of room and closet

Repondent/Plaintiff's and Appellant/Defendant's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 608; Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
